title: Backstage at Gorillaz' epic, one-off stadium show: 'The vibe is ridiculous'
summary_full: Damon Albarn, De La Soul and Moonchild Sannelly talk backstage as Gorillaz play their biggest show.
summary_public: Damon Albarn, De La Soul and Moonchild Sannelly talk backstage as Gorillaz play their biggest show.
